1) Save your email above. 2) Press \"Req: 1) Save your email above. 2) Press "Request OTP code" — a code is emailed to you. 3) Enter the code and press "Confirm OTP". A new OTP is only needed if the session dies (e.g. you opened the official app).
Defaults target Europe. IMPORTANT: set ': Defaults target Europe. IMPORTANT: set 'Dept ID' to your account country's international dialing code (Italy=39 [default], France=33, Germany=49, UK=44, Netherlands=31). A mismatched Dept ID makes login fail with 'Please contact customer service for assistance'. Change the other fields only for non-EU markets.
Minimum time between wake requests — the: Minimum time between wake requests — the backend rate-limits these.
The account PIN used to authorise vehicl: The account PIN used to authorise vehicle commands. A wrong PIN can lock the account — enter it carefully.
Unofficial, reverse-engineered adapter. Not affiliated with Omoda / Jaecoo / Chery. Use only on your own vehicle, at your own risk. Tip: use a delegated second account so the official app isn't logged out.
Wakes the car for fresh GPS/telemetry wh: Wakes the car for fresh GPS/telemetry while parked. Every wake costs a little 12V power.
Your account country's phone prefix, e.g: Your account country's phone prefix, e.g. IT=39, FR=33, DE=49, UK=44, NL=31.
